title: DEBTORS ANONYMOUS - 211info
text: DEBTORS ANONYMOUS DEBTORS ANONYMOUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 12-step program for people who want to stop incurring unsecured debt. Unsecured debt is money that people borrow without promising to give up something (like a house or car) if they cannot pay it back. Offers face-to-face, phone, and internet meetings. Website provides a search tool for finding local in-person meetings. Website Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies - (800) 421-2383 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (800) 421-2383 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Debt/Overspending Support Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
